requestTypeFields.name: Customer Email Address
requestTypeFields.description: Enter your email. We will use this to send you updates on your request.

requestTypeFields.name: Phone Number
requestTypeFields.description: Enter your phone number if you prefer to be contacted by phone.

requestTypeFields.name: Subject
requestTypeFields.description: Enter a brief subject for your question. Example: "How do I configure automatic inventory replenishment?"

requestTypeFields.name: Description
requestTypeFields.description: Provide as much context as possible: what you are trying to achieve, what you have already tried, and any relevant details about your setup or workflow.

requestTypeFields.name: Ticket # or Purchase Order # (if applicable)
requestTypeFields.description: If your question relates to a specific work order or purchase order, enter the number here.

requestTypeFields.name: Attachment
requestTypeFields.description: Upload any screenshots, videos or files that help explain your question or provide context.

requestTypeFields.name: Priority / Severity
requestTypeFields.description: Business Impact: Critical = Catastrophic; High = Major; Medium = Moderate; Low = Minimal
